name: Roshan R. Mishra
comment: Borneel is an excellent resource at Codepth. His all-round knowledge of data science and ability to present his research effectively by his writing prowess makes him a truly valuable asset in the team. I've been working with him for over a year now, and I vouch for his skills and believe in his potential.

name: René Falk
comment: Mr. Phukan was immediately able to familiarize himself with the tasks assigned to him and to solve emerging problems quickly and reliably. Mr. Phukan was consistently highly motivated and pursued agreed goals independently and with the greatest accuracy, conscientiousness, and efficiency. He had a sure sense for what was important and essential. He worked extremely reliably at all times.

name: Hartmut Wiehle
comment: Mr. Phukan played an integral role in developing and relaunching our new dynamic company website. From designing to deploying a fault-proof website with all its tools and databases within a short time-frame, he completed it all while keeping a close cooperation with the management. Borneel's skills are highly recommended.

name: Matthias Gräf
comment: Mr Phukan has exceptional abilities in the product development field which he provided during his tenure at Golf Post in an outstanding way. He helped us to find new approaches to our ongoing development tasks and practices. His dedicated performance and strong endurance were very important and a great benefit for the company.

name: Valentin Siegert
comment: Borneel displayed an exceptional ability to work independently while maintaining an open and collaborative attitude. His proactive approach to integrating his work seamlessly with the larger research framework and his thoroughness and adaptability made his contributions valuable and impactful.

name: Antonio Zill
comment: Borneel displayed an exceptional ability to work independently while maintaining an open and collaborative attitude. His proactive approach to integrating his work seamlessly with the larger research framework and his thoroughness and adaptability made his contributions valuable and impactful.
